---
title: "FDA_ALD_sim"
author: "Suryadyuti Baral"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(pracma)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(parallel)
library(fda)
begin = Sys.time()
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/ldm.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/kerFctn.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/Rfunctions.R")
set.seed(35)
n_subj = 250
age <- 0:19
tfine <-  seq(0, 19, length.out = 240)
method <- "normal"
rep_cond <- 100
sim_data <- simulate_exponential_decay(n_subjects = n_subj, x = tfine, noise = .1)

matplot(sim_data$x, sim_data$trajectories[, 1:n_subj], type = "l", lty = 1,
        ylab = "y", xlab = "Time", main = "Exponential Decay Trajectories")

```

```{r}
sim_al_data <- simulate_accelerated_longitudinal(Y_full = sim_data$trajectories, n_time_points = 3)

# Plot sparse trajectories
matplot(sim_al_data$x_full, sim_al_data$Y_full, type = "l", lty = 2,
        col = "gray", ylab = "y", xlab = "Time", main = "Accelerated Longitudinal Sampling")
for (i in 1:n_subj) {
  points(sim_al_data$Lt[[i]], sim_al_data$Ly[[i]], col = i, pch = 16)
  lines(sim_al_data$Lt[[i]], sim_al_data$Ly[[i]], col = i)
}

```

```{r}
# Generate initial values depending on method
  if (method == "normal") {
    z02 <- generate_initial_values(
      Lt_list = sim_al_data$Lt,
      Ly_list = sim_al_data$Ly,
      age_grid = age,
      m = rep_cond,
      method = "normal"
    )
  } else if (method == "replicate") {
    z02 <- generate_initial_values(
      Lt_list = sim_data$Lt_true,
      Ly_list = sim_data$Ly_true,
      age_grid = age,
      m = rep_cond,
      method = "replicate"
    )
  } else {
    stop("Invalid method. Use 'normal' or 'replicate'.")
  }

  # Fit models
acd_fda_2 <- ldm(sim_al_data$Ly, sim_al_data$Lt, z02, age,
    optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)

# 1. Round time names from rownames of Y_full
time_names <- round(sim_al_data$x_full, 1)
x_rounded <- round(age, 1)
unique_times <- sort(unique(x_rounded))

# 2. For each unique time in age, find the first matching index in time_names
matching_indices <- sapply(unique_times, function(t) {
  match(t, time_names)  # match returns the first occurrence
})

# 3. Subset the trajectory matrix using these first-matching indices
Y_matched <- sim_al_data$Y_full[matching_indices, ]
colnames(Y_matched) <- paste0("Subject_", seq_len(ncol(Y_matched)))

# 4. Convert to long format for true trajectories
true_df <- as.data.frame(Y_matched) %>%
  mutate(Time = age) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Time, names_to = "Subject", values_to = "y") %>%
  mutate(group = "True")

# 5. Estimated trajectories from acd_fda$path
est_df <- as.data.frame(t(acd_fda_2$path)) %>%
  mutate(Time = age) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Time, names_to = "Subject", values_to = "y") %>%
  mutate(group = "Estimated")

# 6. (Optional) Observed snippets from sim_al_data$Ly
obs_df <- map2_dfr(sim_al_data$Ly, sim_al_data$Lt,
                   ~ tibble(Time = .y, y = .x),
                   .id = "Subject") %>%
  mutate(group = "Observed")

# 7. Combine all
df_all <- bind_rows(true_df, est_df, obs_df)

# 8. Plot
ggplot(df_all, aes(x = Time, y = y, group = Subject, color = group)) +
  geom_line(data = filter(df_all, group == "True"), 
            linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = filter(df_all, group == "Estimated"), 
            alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = filter(df_all, group == "Observed"), 
            linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("True" = "gray30",
                                "Estimated" = "steelblue",
                                "Observed" = "red")) +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Functional Value", color = "Trajectory Type",
       title = "Accelerated Longitudinal Sampling: \n True vs Estimated vs Observed") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)


```

```{r}
# Evaluate final model
results <- evaluate_simulations(tfine = tfine, sim_al_data = sim_al_data, sim_data = sim_data, acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2, plot = TRUE)

mean(results$ise_opt)
mean(results$ise_all)
mean(results$ie_opt)
mean(results$ie_all)
mean(results$mse_opt)
mean(results$mse_all)
mean(results$bias_opt)
mean(results$bias_all)

```

```{r}
end = Sys.time()
end - begin
```
